features.name: Baseline Static Water Map
features.description: Vite + React + TypeScript + Leaflet app with bilingual UI, static local JSON data, dashboard, station map, and data table.
features.evidence: Verified before harness creation: npm run convert:data converted 1764 records across 126 periods; npm test passed; npm run build passed; GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build passed.

features.name: GitHub Pages Deployment
features.description: Deploy workflow builds with Node 22, npm ci, npm test, production build, Pages artifact upload, and deploy-pages action. App URLs respect the /taipei-feitsui-water-map/ base path.
features.evidence: Added .github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml and verified npm test, npm run build, and GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build.

features.name: Agent Harness
features.description: Maintain lightweight restartable agent instructions, feature state, progress log, verification script, and session handoff.
features.evidence: Harness files created and tailored on 2026-06-16. validate-harness scored 100/100. ./init.sh passed: npm ci, npm run convert:data (1764 records across 126 periods), npm test, npm run build, and GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build. npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities.

features.name: Verified Station Coordinates
features.description: Populate public/data/station-locations.json with source-backed verified coordinates for physical sampling stations, keeping summary rows unmapped.
features.evidence: Current station-locations.json intentionally keeps coordinates missing; stations are shown in the unmapped list.

features.name: Performance Split
features.description: Reduce the current Vite chunk-size warning by code-splitting heavy map/chart code without changing data behavior.
features.evidence: Current build succeeds but warns that the main JS chunk exceeds 500 kB after minification.

features.name: Code Review Fixes
features.description: Review and fix correctness, maintainability, and runtime-resilience findings in the app and data scripts.
features.evidence: Fixed trend charts so they aggregate monthly values instead of connecting unrelated station rows; added safe localStorage access; added visible data-load errors; improved Chinese/English search terms; made data fetch refresh continue across per-resource failures. ./init.sh passed and npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities.

features.name: AI Slop Cleanup
features.description: Regression-tests-first cleanup pass for duplicated utility logic, unused exports, fetcher failure handling, and missing behavior tests.
features.evidence: Added node:test regression coverage for value parsing, ROC date parsing, filtering, summary counts, and station comparison. Deleted unused utility exports/types, deduplicated latest-station-count and dashboard chart/card rendering, and made all-failed resource refreshes fail after writing diagnostics. ./init.sh passed with 5 unit tests; npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities; harness validation remained 100/100.
